(projects.py)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="60" width="340" height="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-1" value="<ul style=""><li style=""><b>open_new_project_dialogs</b>: open modal to create new project</li><li style=""><b>open_del_project_dialogs</b>: open modal to delete projects</li><li style=""><b>_check_and_create_new_project</b>: checks if project name is ok and creates the project folder</li><li style=""><b>_del_project: </b>delete project folder</li><li style=""><b>_load_project_list: </b>loads and displays the project list</li><li style=""><b>set_list_projects</b>: create Kivy widget for every existing project</li><li style=""><b>select_project:</b> load selected project</li><li style=""><b>Download functions</b>: not working</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-1"> <mxGeometry x="-20" y="30" width="350" height="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;shape=flexArrow;" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-2" target="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-42" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-2" target="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-40"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-2" value="Video configuration (video_configuration.py)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="340" width="340" height="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-5" value="<ul style="text-align: left;"><li><b>_select_path:&nbsp;</b>displays allowed video file extensions and let user select</li><li><b>_load_configuration</b>: if the configuration is already done, load it</li><li><b>_display_loaded_configuration</b>: part of _load_configuration</li><li><b>_save_video_configuration</b>: saves current configuration to project and file</li><li><b>load_video</b>: load video file and display it using custom Kivy player widget</li><li><b>remove_video</b>: remove current player widget</li><li><b>setters functions to set following data</b>: start time, end time, frame frequency to analyse and lens position</li><li><b>validate_video_configuration</b>: check all data formats and save it to project file</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-2"> <mxGeometry x="-10" y="60" width="340" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-44" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-3" target="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-40"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-3" value="Bathymetry configuration (bathymetry.py)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="650" width="340" height="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-10" value="<ul><li style="text-align: left;"><b>_select_path</b>: open the file explorer to select the bathymmetry file</li><li style="text-align: left;"><b>_load_bathymetry</b>: checks if bathymetry is existing and if so, displays it</li><li style="text-align: left;"><b>_save_bathymetry</b>: save bathymetry to current project</li><li style="text-align: left;"><b>load_graph</b>: load custom Kivy widget to display the matplotlib graph of the bathymetry</li><li style="text-align: left;"><b>exit_file_manager</b>: self-explanatory</li><li style="text-align: left;"><b>remove_graph</b>: remove graph widget from the screen</li><li style="text-align: left;"><b>data setters</b>: water level and surface coefficient</li><li style="text-align: left;"><b>validate_bathymetry</b>: check if data formats are correct and register them in the project file</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-3"> <mxGeometry x="5" y="20" width="330" height="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-15" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;shape=flexArrow;" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-4" target="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-5" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-28" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-4" target="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-46" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-4" target="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-40"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-4" value="Filter (filter_video.py)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="1220" width="340" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-11" value="<ul><li><b>_load_video_preview:</b> loads an image to preview the video</li><li>The rest of the file is basic function to navigate through screen.</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-4"> <mxGeometry x="-15" y="20" width="340" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;shape=flexArrow;" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-5" target="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-6" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-49" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-5" target="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-40"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-5" value="PIV (piv.py)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=23;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="1380" width="340" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-20" value="<ul><li><b>_piv_calculation</b>: launches piv analysis by calling generate_piv</li><li><b>cancel_piv</b>: not working</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-5"> <mxGeometry y="25" width="310" height="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-6" value="Post-processing (post_process.py" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="1560" width="340" height="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-22" value="<ul><li><b>on_button_press</b>: prepares PyORC video and launches transect calculations. Then remove current Kivy widgets and display the result image as well as the obtained river discharge</li><li><b>_load_transect_selection</b>: display a ShapeOnImage custom Kivy widget to select the transect where to display the discharge</li><li>bunch of utilitary functions to remove/display widgets</li><li><b>process_and_plot_transects</b>: process the transect by calling functions from the back transect file, and return the river discharge array</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-6"> <mxGeometry y="30" width="340" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-7" value="Transect" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-459" y="1805" width="334" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-35" value="<ul><li><b>delimiter_points_bathy</b>: orthorectifiate chosen transect points</li><li><b>all_points_bathy</b>: interpolates points between both chosen transect points</li><li><b>transect_plot</b>: plot velocity vectors on the chosen delimiter</li><li><b>transect</b>: coordinate all function and return river discharge array containing 5 quantiles</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-7"> <mxGeometry x="-16" y="-7.5" width="346" height="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-9" value="Utils" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-459" y="1185" width="290" height="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-12" value="<ul><li><b>Image_generator</b></li><ul><li><b>video_to_image:</b> converts a video frame to a Kivy Image</li><li><b>get_video_frame</b>: retrieves a frame from a video and convert it to cv2 Video frame</li><li><b>plot_to_image</b>: convert matplotlib plot to Kivy Image</li></ul><li><b>utils</b></li><ul><li><b>check_internet()</b>: sends a ping to google to see if the app is connected to internet, if not return False</li></ul></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-9"> <mxGeometry x="-11" y="30" width="290" height="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-10" value="Saving-project-data" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="953" width="290" height="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-40" value="<ul><li>Getters and setters for each part of the project, these setters contain multiple format check for each value</li><li><b>_save_step:</b> mark a step as done in the project configuration file</li><li><b>_check_backup_file_format</b>: check if a project configuration file is correct, and if not stops its loading</li><li><b>_check_missing_data</b>: check if some data is missing in new video configuration or new bathymetry</li><li><b>_convert_dist_to_points</b>: used in beacons configuration to convert distances to the right format for PyORC</li><li><b>generate_cam_config</b>: use the different configuration to generate a CameraConfig object mandatory to launch PIV analysis</li><li><b>generate_piv:</b> launches PIV analysis</li><li><b>save_post_process</b>: saving post_process step</li><li><b>load_project:</b> check given path and if correct, loads the project data in the current project object</li><li><b>create_project</b>: self explanatory</li><li><b>delete_project</b>: self explanatory</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-10"> <mxGeometry y="22.5" width="290" height="367.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-8" value="Mask" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="-480" y="1658" width="360" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-36" value="Contains different functions to apply masks to piv resulting dataset and plot it. These function are used after the PIV and before processing transects, the initial velocity field is processed here" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-8"> <mxGeometry y="30" width="360" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-17" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;shape=flexArrow;" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-14" target="WC5ALQL28SlVJFVu4Gaj-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-33" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-14" target="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-18"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-45" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-14"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="470" y="1160" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-14" value="Beacons configuration (beacons.py)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="990" width="340" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-15" value="<ul><li><b>_load_beacons_selection: </b>if a configuration already exists, loads it. If not, launch beacons detection</li><li><b>display_loaded_beacons</b>: display result of the previous function as a custom Kivy Widget - ShapeOnImage</li><li><b>display_beacons_selection</b>: utilitary for display_loaded_beacons</li><li><b>is_input_valid</b>: check format for given input</li><li><b>validate_beacons</b>: check if each input is correct and save it into project file using <b>_save_beacons</b></li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-14"> <mxGeometry x="-5" y="15" width="340" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-16" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;shape=flexArrow;" edge="1" parent="1" source="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-10" target="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-14"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-18" value="GCP detection (gcp_detection.py)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-426" y="953" width="200" height="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-19" value="<ul><li><b>beacons_detection</b>: coordinate beacons detection</li><li><b>GCP_detect</b>: detect beacons and return a list of positions</li><li><b>sort_src</b>: sort detected beacons in the right order for the PIV to work</li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-18"> <mxGeometry x="-15" width="210" height="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RwGUywP3gWajSrpuC48f-34" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.75;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 11px; margin-left: 451px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 130px; margin-left: 432px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

ul.li: open_new_project_dialogs: open modal to create new project
open_del_project_dialogs: open modal to delete projects
_check_and_create_new_project: checks if project name is ok and creates the project folder
_del_project: delete project folder
_load_project_list: loads and displays the project list
set_list_projects: create Kivy widget for every existing project
select_project: load selected project
Download functions: not working

switch.text: open_new_project_dialogs: open modal to create new project...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 291px; margin-left: 451px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 415px; margin-left: 441px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

ul.li: _select_path: displays allowed video file extensions and let user select
_load_configuration: if the configuration is already done, load it
_display_loaded_configuration: part of _load_configuration
_save_video_configuration: saves current configuration to project and file
load_video: load video file and display it using custom Kivy player widget
remove_video: remove current player widget
setters functions to set following data: start time, end time, frame frequency to analyse and lens position
validate_video_configuration: check all data formats and save it to project file

switch.text: _select_path: displays allowed video file extensions and...

_save_bathymetry: save bathymetry to current project
load_graph: load custom Kivy widget to display the matplotlib graph of the bathymetry
exit_file_manager: self-explanatory
remove_graph: remove graph widget from the screen
data setters: water level and surface coefficient
validate_bathymetry: check if data formats are correct and register them in the project file

bunch of utilitary functions to remove/display widgets
process_and_plot_transects: process the transect by calling functions from the back transect file, and return the river discharge array

ul.li: delimiter_points_bathy: orthorectifiate chosen transect points
all_points_bathy: interpolates points between both chosen transect points
transect_plot: plot velocity vectors on the chosen delimiter
transect: coordinate all function and return river discharge array containing 5 quantiles

ul.li: video_to_image: converts a video frame to a Kivy Image
get_video_frame: retrieves a frame from a video and convert it to cv2 Video frame
plot_to_image: convert matplotlib plot to Kivy Image
check_internet(): sends a ping to google to see if the app is connected to internet, if not return False

ul.li: Getters and setters for each part of the project, these setters contain multiple format check for each value
_save_step: mark a step as done in the project configuration file
_check_backup_file_format: check if a project configuration file is correct, and if not stops its loading
_check_missing_data: check if some data is missing in new video configuration or new bathymetry
_convert_dist_to_points: used in beacons configuration to convert distances to the right format for PyORC
generate_cam_config: use the different configuration to generate a CameraConfig object mandatory to launch PIV analysis
generate_piv: launches PIV analysis
save_post_process: saving post_process step
load_project: check given path and if correct, loads the project data in the current project object
create_project: self explanatory
delete_project: self explanatory

switch.text: Getters and setters for each part of the project...

ul.li: _load_beacons_selection: if a configuration already exists, loads it. If not, launch beacons detection
display_loaded_beacons: display result of the previous function as a custom Kivy Widget - ShapeOnImage
display_beacons_selection: utilitary for display_loaded_beacons
is_input_valid: check format for given input
validate_beacons: check if each input is correct and save it into project file using _save_beacons
